introSection: Wild Rider was a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Wild Rider opened in 1978 and replaced Big Fury, a similarly-sized roller coaster from Pinfari. It operated until 1980, and was removed in March 1982. What happened to the ride after this isn't currently known.

The plot where Wild Rider previously stood was later redeveloped for Splashwater Falls.

fullText:
Wild Rider was a steel roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Adventure in Jackson, New Jersey, USA.

Wild Rider opened in 1978 and replaced Big Fury, a similarly-sized roller coaster from Pinfari. It operated until 1980, and was removed in March 1982. What happened to the ride after this isn't currently known.

The plot where Wild Rider previously stood was later redeveloped for Splashwater Falls.

Blue track with white supports.
